auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Jason Haylock, CPA, CA)
economic_notes: Nation holds interests in multiple related entities including Kluskus Management Holdings Ltd., Lhoosk'uz Development Group Limited Partnership, 0886366 B.C. Ltd., Lhoosk'uz Management Ltd., Castle Mountain Hydro Ltd. (2.5%), and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Contribution from New Gold Inc./Artemis Gold Inc. of $315,540. Three CMHC forgivable loans totalling $125,000 for housing rehabilitation.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021, not 2024. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' at Port Coquitlam, BC with engagement partner Jason Haylock. The statement is a Summary Financial Statement with fund accounting (Operating, Trust, Investment funds consolidated). Six related entities accounted for by modified equity method. Expenses note shows total consolidated expenses of $2,532,887 per Note 13 by object, but Statement of Operations shows $2,619,649 — difference likely due to capital projects classification. Net financial assets of $10,897,164 includes remeasurement gains of $500,102 on marketable securities. Contribution from Artemis Gold/New Gold significantly lower in 2021 ($315,540) vs 2020 ($2,760,364). Prior year accumulated surplus taken from Note 10 total. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, FNHA, BC Gaming, CCATEC, Province of BC, FNESC, NRC, NRT government transfers.
